title: Welcome, Operator
intro: Welcome to AUDAZ TACTICAL. This platform is built so you can log training, manage your armory, run ballistic calculations, communicate with your tactical team, and track performance.
introContinue: Before you continue, please review a few important points:

firearms.title: For Firearm Users
firearms.body: Ballistic calculations and training logs on this platform are theoretical / informational. Always follow firearm safety rules in the physical world (muzzle direction, trigger discipline, target confirmation). No data in the app replaces on-site safety protocols.

personnel.title: For Duty Personnel (Military, Police, Security, etc.)
personnel.body: If you serve in an official organization, you may use a callsign or alias on the platform instead of your real name, rank, or unit details to protect your identity. That choice is entirely yours.

rules.title: General Rules — Forum and Comms Use
rules.lead: All communication on the platform is treated as a professional operational environment.
prohibited: Insults, profanity, or personally aggressive language
Discrimination based on race, gender, religion, nationality, or identity
Sharing or requesting personal information (real name, address, phone, organization details)
Real / graphic imagery of violence, injury, or death (e.g. wounded or shot persons)
Obscene, pornographic, or sexual imagery or text
Spam, irrelevant advertising, or malicious links
rules.reportBody: Flag inappropriate content with the flag icon; reports are kept confidential and reviewed. False reports are also evaluated.
rules.enforcementBody: First violations may receive a warning; repeated or serious violations may lead to temporary restrictions; severe violations may result in permanent account suspension. Outcomes are delivered by notification; you retain the right to appeal.
rules.responsibilityBody: You are responsible for content you share; the platform does not take sides in disputes between users.

footer: You can re-read this briefing anytime under Settings → Welcome, Operator.

errors.saveFailed: Could not save preference — try again.
